1868480.name: Coloring Pixels - Isometric 2
1868480.description:
Isometric 2 Book

This Isometric 2 themed book unlocks 20 additional levels for Coloring Pixels! The second book of it's kind offers various images and scenes all designed in the isometric perspective!

Isometric is back by popular demand!

Contents

The Isometric 2 book unlocks the following images:

  • Blocks - 45x45
  • Boombox - 77x71
  • Sushi - 85x65
  • Beach - 88x52
  • Treasure - 96x102
  • Isometric Pattern - 98x121
  • Earth - 100x110
  • House - 103x106
  • Thatched - 110x72
  • Urban - 126x92
  • Woods Cabin - 127x78
  • Beehive - 130x100
  • Dog House - 140x123
  • City - 158x148
  • Tower - 165x230
  • Modern Living - 184x133
  • Oasis - 200x130
  • Truck - 236x176
  • Interior - 237x220
  • Fuel - 265x165
